markets.question: Spread: Southampton FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Southampton FC" if Southampton FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Coventry City FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Coventry City FC vs. Southampton FC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Coventry City FC and Southampton FC, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Coventry City FC and Southampton FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

markets.question: Coventry City FC vs. Southampton FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game between Coventry City FC and Southampton FC, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Coventry City FC and Southampton FC each score at least one goal during the game.
